name: PHYS_MEM_MAP_Intel_Nal_iQVW64_shape
notes: Intel Nal family PHYS_MEM_MAP fingerprint: MmMapIoSpace called with CacheType=MmNonCached via prologue 'mov [rsp+30h],rbx; mov ebx,0xC86A8004; test eax,eax; jz; mov rdx,rax; xor r8d,r8d; mov rcx,reg; call cs:MmMapIoSpace'. Sequences 2-3 anchor on device-type 0x8086 IOCTL DWORDs (0x80862013, 0x80862007) via 'cmp r32, imm32' or 'sub r32, imm32' little-endian encoding. Import triad MmMapIoSpace+MmGetPhysicalAddress+MmUnmapIoSpace gates the family. Reference: iQVW64.SYS, 2 MmMapIoSpace call hits + 2 IOCTL anchors = 4 occurrences self-test.
